name: MuntuAI MCP
description: MCP server for MuntuAI — an outreach automation platform. Agents can create campaigns, manage domains and senders, import leads, review drafts, and monitor performance via JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP.
notes: Current production server protocol revision is 2025-03-26.
Clients should send a stable mcp-session-id header for the lifetime of one logical session when possible.

authentication.description: Bearer token in the format mnt_<keyId>.<secret>. Create keys in MuntuAI Settings → Agent Keys.

autonomyLevels.description: Read-only access. Can read campaigns, domains, senders, events, and leads.
Read + create + modify. Can run campaigns end-to-end: import leads, create campaigns, launch, review drafts, send, manage domains and senders.
Full access. Can pause/resume campaigns, pause/delete senders, and all copilot actions.

resources.name: workspace
resources.description: Workspace profile, policy settings, and infrastructure counts.

resources.name: campaigns
resources.description: All campaigns (active workflows and draft plans). Paginated.

resources.name: domains
resources.description: All workspace domains with verification status and DNS requirements. Paginated.

resources.name: senders
resources.description: All email sender accounts with status and connection health. Paginated.

resources.name: campaign-plans
resources.description: Draft review queue — campaign plans pending approval. Paginated.

resources.name: events
resources.description: Workspace system events. Filterable by eventType, resourceType, actorType. Paginated.

tools.name: get_agent_key_info
tools.description: Return metadata about the current agent key: name, autonomy level, workspace, expiry.

tools.name: get_campaign_performance
tools.description: Live performance metrics for a campaign: lead status counts, open/reply/bounce rates.

tools.name: list_campaign_drafts
tools.description: All drafted emails for a campaign.

tools.name: sample_campaign_drafts
tools.description: Random sample of drafted emails for quality review.

tools.name: get_lead_group_details
tools.description: Lead status counts for a workflow, by workflowId or name.

tools.name: get_lead_sample
tools.description: Sample of leads with enrichment data.

tools.name: list_managed_domains
tools.description: All domains with verification status and next-action hint.

tools.name: check_domain_status
tools.description: DNS verification status for a specific domain.

tools.name: list_ready_senders
tools.description: Senders currently ready to send campaigns.

tools.name: get_sender_health
tools.description: Health snapshot and readiness gates for a sender.

tools.name: create_campaign
tools.description: Create an outreach campaign with leads, senders, and email configuration.

tools.name: update_campaign_settings
tools.description: Update an existing campaign's configuration.

tools.name: launch_campaign
tools.description: Start the enrichment → drafting → sending pipeline. Returns immediately.

tools.name: send_campaign_drafts
tools.description: Send drafted emails after review. Optionally filter by leadIds.

tools.name: import_leads
tools.description: Import leads into a workflow from array or CSV URL.

tools.name: enrich_lead_sample
tools.description: Enrich a sample of leads (up to 5). Emits enrichment.sample_complete when done.

tools.name: generate_email_preview
tools.description: Generate a preview email for a lead without persisting it.

tools.name: refine_email_preview
tools.description: Regenerate a preview email incorporating user feedback.

tools.name: generate_campaign_guide
tools.description: Generate sampleEmail and outreachGuide from a campaign brief.

tools.name: add_domain
tools.description: Register a sending domain and get DNS records to publish.

tools.name: trigger_domain_verification
tools.description: Trigger DNS verification after records are published.

tools.name: create_sender
tools.description: Create a managed email sender on a verified domain.

tools.name: assign_sender_to_campaign
tools.description: Assign a ready sender to a campaign.

tools.name: subscribe_events
tools.description: Register a webhook endpoint to receive workspace events.

tools.name: submit_campaign_plan
tools.description: Submit a legacy draft-review artifact for policy evaluation.

tools.name: approve_campaign_plan
tools.description: Approve a pending legacy draft-review artifact.

tools.name: pause_campaign
tools.description: Pause a running campaign at the next batch checkpoint.

tools.name: resume_campaign
tools.description: Resume a paused campaign from its last checkpoint.

tools.name: pause_sender
tools.description: Pause a sender account.

tools.name: delete_sender
tools.description: Delete a managed sender and its inbox.
